product_depth.justification: All three features fully implemented with complete logic, not stubs. F-020 adds two hook entries, F-021 refines existing hook, F-022 adds verification subcommand with cross-reference.

functionality.justification: All contract checks pass. Hooks have correct matchers verified via regex testing. verify-round-numbering returns correct JSON. log-event confirms events.jsonl writes.

visual_design.justification: Maps to documentation clarity. coordinator.md clearly documents hook automation in multiple sections (step 17, Script Calls, Auto-Commit Protocol, flow diagram).

code_quality.justification: Zero npm dependencies. Follows existing ESM patterns. verify-round-numbering uses same readState/out/UserError conventions. hooks.json entries follow established structure.

contract_checks.evidence: All three features have full implementations, not stubs or placeholders
hooks.json contains 3 PostToolUse entries with correct ids, matchers, patterns, and commands
verify-round-numbering returns { ok: true, mismatches: [], rounds_found_in_files: [1], rounds_in_state: [1] }
coordinator.md documents hook-automated progress-append in step 17, Script Calls, and Auto-Commit Protocol
No npm dependencies added. New code follows existing harness-companion.mjs patterns.

non_blocking_issues: hooks.json pattern field is informational -- Claude Code may not natively filter on it. The hook fires based on matcher (tool name). Pattern is for human/coordinator consumption.

feature_evidence.reason: hooks.json contains PostToolUse hooks for agent_spawned (Agent tool) and phase_changed (Bash tool with state-mutate pattern). Both call log-event via harness-companion.mjs.
post:bash:harness-progress-update hook refined with auto-commit pattern. coordinator.md documents hook automation in step 17 and Auto-Commit Protocol.
verify-round-numbering subcommand registered and functional. Returns structured JSON with ok/mismatches/rounds. Handles empty sprints directory.

tests_written: manual contract check verification via node invocations
test_results.coverage: N/A -- infrastructure hooks and CLI subcommand

non_blocking: hooks.json pattern field is informational for human consumption -- Claude Code hook system filters on matcher (tool name) only

internal_consistency.justification: All new hooks follow the established hook structure (matcher, hooks array, description, id). New subcommand follows existing switch/case and SUBCOMMANDS map pattern.

intentionality.justification: Hook IDs follow post:<tool>:harness-<purpose> convention. Pattern regexes are specific to their use cases. verify-round-numbering has project-specific cross-reference logic.

craft.justification: Consistent JSON structure in hooks.json. ESM import/export patterns. UserError class reuse. Proper JSON output via out() helper.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: Hooks will fire in the Claude Code PostToolUse system. verify-round-numbering is self-contained and immediately usable by coordinator.
